response.title: Lead Healthcare Data Analyst
response.description: We are seeking a Lead Healthcare Data Analyst to join our dynamic team at HealthTech Innovations. In this role, you will lead data analysis efforts to improve healthcare outcomes and drive strategic decision-making. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to gather data requirements, analyze complex datasets, and deliver actionable insights. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in healthcare analytics and a passion for data-driven solutions.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Statistics, or related field; Master's preferred
